title: Refactor: Migrate to functional programming style
original_text: Refactored to use functional programming patterns. Replaced mutable state with immutable data structures. Implemented pure functions for data transformations. Added function composition for complex operations. Used map/filter/reduce instead of loops. This reduces bugs and improves testability. Added tests for functional components. Result: 46 tests pass.
expected_subject: refactor(style): migrate to functional programming patterns
expected_body_lines: - Replace mutable state with immutable data structures
- Implement pure functions for data transformations
- Add function composition for complex operations
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(style): migrate to functional programming patterns"
